adr_index.title: ADR-0001 — QIKI is a machine body, not a model voice
adr_index.decision_summary: QIKI рассматривается как машинное тело. Голос, модель и ORION не являются последней физической истиной. Последняя физическая истина должна идти из runtime state, simulation, telemetry, events, ACK, effect confirmation, audit and blackbox.

adr_index.title: ADR-0002 — Body canon is separated from old game GDD
adr_index.decision_summary: Актуальный канон тела QIKI выносится в отдельный hardware / physics documentation package. Старый GDD сохраняется как game-design / historical layer и получает superseded / alignment note.

adr_index.title: ADR-0003 — Battery and supercap are separated
adr_index.decision_summary: Battery и supercap разделяются. Battery отвечает за длительность жизни. Supercap отвечает за краткие пиковые действия. Peak action requires SoC_cap, PDU allowance and thermal clearance.

adr_index.title: ADR-0004 — RTG is a trickle source, not boost-source
adr_index.decision_summary: RTG-class source является heavy / trickle source. RTG-class source не является boost-source. RTG может поддерживать survival, drift, cold-zone, sleep and slow recharge, но не должен напрямую питать пиковые действия.

adr_index.title: ADR-0005 — Reactor-class source is external / station / sled
adr_index.decision_summary: Reactor-class source является external / station / sled / heavy infrastructure. QIKI может подключаться к нему только через validated structural-rated, electrically safe, thermally checked and passport-valid bridge.

adr_index.title: ADR-0006 — Baseline NBL is emergency low-rate only
adr_index.decision_summary: Baseline NBL является emergency low-rate channel only. NBL используется для коротких критических пакетов и требует criticality gating, SoC_cap, PDU allowance and thermal clearance.

adr_index.title: ADR-0007 — Protection is deployable deflector, not absolute shield
adr_index.decision_summary: Protection is a constrained mechanism against a specific threat class, not an absolute shield. Radiation deflector / deployable deflector can be used as a constrained protective mechanism with cost, geometry and degradation.

adr_index.title: ADR-0008 — Field drive is not baseline
adr_index.decision_summary: Field drive is not baseline. If used, field drive must be Terta-exotic / advanced speculative / scenario-specific and must have explicit cost, limits, risk, cooldown, evidence path, audit and blackbox relevance.

adr_index.title: ADR-0009 — Bayonet requires mechanical hard lock
adr_index.decision_summary: Bayonet requires mechanical hard lock, structural check, electrical safety, umbilical mate, module handshake and passport validation before bridge allowed. Magnetic pre-align is not structural lock. Soft capture is not bridge allowed.

adr_index.title: ADR-0010 — RCS requires Thrust Map and Torque Map
adr_index.decision_summary: RCS requires Thrust Map and Torque Map before balanced thrust, all-axis control, safe docking burn, tumble recovery or full maneuverability can be claimed.

adr_index.title: ADR-0011 — Module passport is mandatory
adr_index.decision_summary: Module passport is mandatory for runtime-ready module status. A module without passport is not a runtime module.

adr_index.title: ADR-0012 — First repository patch is documentation-only
adr_index.decision_summary: The first repository patch for QIKI Body v0.2.2 must be documentation-only. Runtime work requires a separate task and evidence.

adr_index.title: ADR-0013 — Reader manual is derived; repo package is primary
adr_index.decision_summary: `10_READER_MANUAL.md` is a derived readable build. Primary source files are `00_INDEX.md` through `09_ACCEPTANCE_CHECKS.md` and `07_ADR/`. If reader manual conflicts with source files, source files win.

adr_index.title: ADR-0014 — ORION is evidence station, not decorative HUD
adr_index.decision_summary: ORION is an evidence station. ORION must show source, freshness, trust, status, reason_codes, target-only, not implemented, calculation-required, ACK, effect confirmation, audit trail and blackbox relevance.

adr_index.title: ADR-0015 — ACK is not effect confirmation
adr_index.decision_summary: ACK is not effect confirmation. Command lifecycle must distinguish request, validation, allowed / rejected, publish, ACK, effect confirmation and audit.
